title: mountnorrisia fragrans
intro: Mountnorrisia fragrans, commonly known as the East African tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. This plant is known for its potential health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, such as asthma. The therapeutic actions of Mountnorrisia fragrans are attributed to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe and calm the body. The bioactive constituents of this plant include sesquiterpenes, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
